title: Lekeeu Knitting Kit for Beginners Adults Children - 12 Colours Yarn & 2 Bamboo Knitting Needles
features: [COMPREHENSIVE KNITTING KIT]: Lekeeu Knitting Kit contains 12 different colors of acrylic yarn (265 yards total) and 2 bamboo needles. No need for a huge investment, it's an excellent knitting kit for beginners, adults and children. Dive into the soft embrace of creativity and make your own knitted masterpiece. Knit, roll and create a world of warmth and wonder!

[12 DIFFERENT COLORS ACRYLIC YARN]: The yarn is made of 100% polyester staple fiber, which is uniformly thick and thin, comfortable and elastic. It is your gateway to the wonderful world of knitting. A wide variety of colors to meet your various knitting needs. Let you wander in the sea of knitting and enjoy the fun of knitting.

[25CM BAMBOO NEEDLE]: Bamboo needles are smooth and lightweight for comfortable use. Like dreamy knitting elves, they help you skillfully knit and finish your work, ensuring a seamless knitting experience. Spend your free time while making you feel happy both physically and mentally. Like a magic wand, knitting a strand of happiness!

[DIY CRAFTS]: As a novice knitter, this knitting for beginners kit will not only help you complete your own unique rags but also improve your knitting skills so that you can make more projects such as mini blankets, pillows, scarves and more. Incorporate personalized elements to create endless possibilities! Lekeeu knitting craft kits is a knitter's paradise!

[IDEAL GIFT]: This knitting starter kit is a wonderful, thoughtful gift for craft lovers, friends and loved ones. It's also a great choice for parent-child activities! Enhance children's hands-on ability and promote family harmony at the same time! Perfect for Christmas, birthdays, Thanksgiving, and other special occasions.
description: Product Description Lekeeu Knitting Kit for Beginners Adults Children - 12 Colours Yarn & 2 Bamboo Knitting Needles The Beginner Knitting Kit is your gateway to the wonderful world of knitting! Whether you're a newbie or a seasoned pro, this knitting craft kits is a knitting paradise! Package Includes: 12 Colours Yarn 2 Bamboo Knitting Needles The yarn is uniformly thick and thin, soft and comfortable. Colorful, can meet different needs. Bamboo needles are smooth and lightweight, easy to use. Note: To make different crafts you need to find and watch the making video of the corresponding fabric to make it. 12 colors: blue, pink, yellow, purple, white, red, green, orange, light orange, red, light green, black. Spend your free time and enhance your sense of self-accomplishment. DIY blankets, hats, rags, scarves and other woolen fabrics. Ideal gift for loved ones, friends, knitting lovers. Perfect for Christmas, Birthday, Thanksgiving and so on. See More
